name: status-report
description: Machine-readable sibling of the status report: highlights, in-progress work, blockers, steering metrics, and next-up items as data arrays. The agent expands each exemplar element, one per item.

slots.description: Extra header meta items (cadence, author); one per array element.
Highlight marker variant. The highlights array carries one exemplar element to clone per highlight.
Active task name. The inProgress array carries one exemplar element to clone per task.
Blocker severity variant. The blockers array carries one exemplar element to clone per blocker.
KPI label. The metrics array carries one exemplar element to clone per metric.
Planned upcoming task. The nextUp array carries one exemplar element to clone per item.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.task[]: { name: string, sub: string, progress: string|number, owner: string }
shape.blocker[]: { variant: enum[default,warn], title: string, owner: string, description: string }
shape.metric[]: { label: string, value: string, delta: string, deltaDir: enum[up,down,none] }
